SEARCH
Package com.nib.grammars

Interface FtpParserListener

All Superinterfaces:
org.antlr.v4.runtime.tree.ParseTreeListener
All Known Implementing Classes:
FtpParserBaseListener
public interface FtpParserListener extends org.antlr.v4.runtime.tree.ParseTreeListener
This interface defines a complete listener for a parse tree produced by FtpParser.

  • Method Summary
